REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANT REAL ESTATE EQUITY EXCHANGE, INC. IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT REGARDING REMEDIES UNDER THE CONTRACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INDEMNITY IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHIFT ITS BURDEN AND SHOW THAT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS RIPE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Motion For Summary Judgment , Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (Court Call):

Allison J. Law, Goodkin Law Group, APC, (310) 552-3322 - appearing on behalf of plaintiff Thornton Tomasetti, Inc.

Roey Rahmil, Shartsis Friese, LLP, (415) 6500, ext. 283 - appearing on behalf of defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion For Summary Judgment, Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc. is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication as to the cause of action for breach of contract is DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding remedies under the contract. Motion for summary adjudication as to the cause of action for indemnity is denied. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that this cause of action is ripe. Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF THORNTON TOMASETTI, INC.'s Motion for Summary Judgment, Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Against Defendant Real Estate Equity Exchange, Inc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter transferred to department 501 to be heard on January 28, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all breach of lease/recovery of rent cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
